name: MAV Beauty Brands Inc.
summary: MAV Beauty Brands Inc. operates as a personal care company. The company's products include various hair care, body care, and beauty products, such as shampoo, conditioner, hair styling products, treatments, vitamins, body wash, and body and hand lotion across various collections that each serve personalized consumer need. Its product platform consists of personal care brands, such as Marc Anthony True Professional, Renpure, Cake Beauty, and The Mane Choice. The company markets its products through approximately 100 retailers in 25 countries worldwide. The company was formerly known as MAC Topco Holdings Inc. and changed its name to MAV Beauty Brands Inc. in May 2018. MAV Beauty Brands Inc. was incorporated in 1995 and is headquartered in Vaughan, Canada.
